productName: HashBreak - Hashbreak 2 Pack - Red Cream Soda - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Red Cream Soda and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a smooth, creamy flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
